label: Lawn-Care Platform — agent cluster
summary: A build-and-operate agent cluster for lawn-care / landscaping service businesses. SWFL-specialized, rules-based (no API quota needed), designed to out-operate Jobber.

agents.name: lawn-care-gm
agents.role: Coordinator — owns the roadmap, runs the cluster, writes the GM brief.

agents.name: crm-agent
agents.role: Churn prediction + upsell detection per customer.

reuse: Tenant-agnostic. The recursive-expansion engine clones this pack as the template for any new service-business tenant: copy the directory, the brain needs no changes, install the GM daemon pointed at the new slug. This is the first entry in the Day14 vertical-pack library — build packs ahead of demand.
